response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories change minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth needs time.
Time passes fast.
Fast days fly.
Fly pages turn.
Turn pages now.
Now count words.
Words form lines.
Lines make pages.
Pages fill books.
Books take time.
Time equals days.
Days hold hours.
Hours bring light.
Light shines bright.
Bright sun rises.
Rises morning sun.
Sun warms earth.
Earth spins round.
Round world turns.
Turns night comes.
Comes dark sky.
Sky holds stars.
Stars guide paths.
Paths lead home.
Home feels safe.
Safe place rests.
Rest brings peace.
Peace calms soul.
Soul finds joy.
Joy fills heart.
Heart beats strong.
